name: Severed Decks
short_description: Feel the tension rise with each flipped card, knowing one bad choice may cost you your head—literally.
detailed_description:
Severed Decks is not your run-of-the-mill blackjack game.

It's a lethal, high-stakes battle where every hand could be your last. In this dark, twisted card game of thee versus thee, two players compete in a gruesome version of blackjack wherein one key difference exists: the loser faces an extremely brutal demise under a menacing, spinning circular saw. Feel the tension rise with each flipped card, knowing one bad choice may cost you your head—literally.
